News and Updates

Current updates for applicants, families, and partners

This section highlights practical updates that improve navigation, admissions clarity, and programme discoverability across the site.

For official notices and additional updates, applicants are encouraged to maintain direct contact with the institute.

Latest Items

Recent site and admissions highlights

Each update links to the relevant section so visitors can move directly from information to action.

March 2026

Admissions support made clearer for prospective applicants

The redesigned admissions experience puts online application access, form downloads, and campus enquiry paths in one visible flow.

Explore →

March 2026

Gallery-led storytelling now highlights campus and skills training

A refreshed gallery direction helps visitors see campus life, student engagement, and the practical side of health training at a glance.

Explore →

March 2026

Programme discovery improved for nursing and midwifery prospects

Visitors can browse certificates, direct diplomas, and extension pathways in a cleaner, more confidence-building layout.

Explore →

Why this update flow matters

Prospective students often decide quickly when information is clear. Focused updates help applicants understand where to start and how to proceed with confidence.

Need an official clarification?

Contact the admissions team directly for entry requirements, deadlines, and intake-specific guidance.

Go to Contact →
